_note: Partial run captured before both providers' free-tier daily quotas (Groq: 100000 TPD; Gemini 2.5-flash: free-tier daily request budget) were exhausted during the same session. Only the entries for which the LLM actually returned a generation are recorded; the rest are marked GEN_FAIL. The harness itself was validated end-to-end on the few successful entries.
